entry.title: Finding the Header Notes for Purchase Requisition
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I need to create a custom Data Model using the data source Purchase Requisition. However, the data source I_PurchaseRequisitionItemAPI01 and its association _PurchaseRequisition which I am currently using, does not contain the field Header Notes. Where can I find the field?

Many thanks

entry.title: Re: BAPI_OBJCL_CHANGE for MARA Characteristic value not replaced
entry.content: I solved my problem by calling 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'.

entry.title: Re: Latest Goal Management - Milestones Table - Rating Scale
entry.content:
Hello Vanessa,

Thank you so much for your response. It would be much appreciated if you could provide me with some more details on how you would configure the milestones table to prepopulate automatically 5 rows pulling the descriptions from a 5-level rating scale.

Many thanks

entry.title: Re: Auto packaging in outbound delivery through abap code
entry.content:
Hello @Daderiga 

You can't pack deliveries with like BAPI_HU_PACK. It is explained in the note 581282 - Packing of deliveries via BAPI or function module

The note recommends to use either WHSCON IDocs or the WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE function. The former is preferable as the function is not released for customer usage.

I'd suggest to trigger WHSCON IDoc from the ZXLTOU02  exit. The IDoc functionality is documented on SAP Help Delivery Interface This way you'll have a SAP supported solution with a robust, workflow enabled error handling out-of-the-box.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP – Security – OAuth 2.0 – Understanding Token Exchange 2: using Destination
entry.content:
Hi Carlos,

I found your blogs on this topic very interesting. I can't understand if it is possible, in a SAP Fiori application that defines a foreign-scope from a backend/cap app, to avoid defining an additional role-templates and frontendscope, but use the same backendscope for the route to the HTML5 Repository defined in xs-app (managed application router)

I tried these two ways in xs-app.json

{
"source": "^(.*)$",
"target": "$1",
"service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
"authenticationType": "xsuaa",
"scope": "$XSAPPNAME(application,backendxsuaa).backendscope"
}
 {
"source": "^(.*)$",
"target": "$1",
"service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
"authenticationType": "xsuaa",
"scope": "backendxsuaa.backendscope"
}

 But I always receive a 403 forbidden error. Of course it works if I use something like $XSAPPNAME.frontendscope in the scope.

EDIT: it worked by specifying the Application Identifier, 'backendxsuaa!txxxx'  but is this the correct way? I don't want to specify identifiers in the source.

Do you know if it is possible to do something like this?

Thanks

entry.title: Tracking of material consumption in Quality Testing through QM Order
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a scenario to map in the Quality. The customer wants to track the consumption of material (Chemicals, Liquid) that occurred during the testing of the Quality Sample. The consumption should be tracked lot-wise for each inspection. I have explored the QM Order option, which is relevant until the activities are captured. I also tried another method where we can capture through PRT but is fixed, and only a Test equipment display mode.

Is there any other way to fulfil the requirement? Anyone can make suggestions on mapping the above scenario.

Regards

Tejas Khanna

entry.title: Re: RAP: Default Value (managed with draft)
entry.content:
Hello Lars,

If I understand your scenario correctly, then using on save determinations that are executed when an instance is created should do the job: e.g. 

 

determination YourDetName on modify { create; }

 

If needed, modified fields can also be defined as trigger conditions.

 

determination YourDetName on modify { create; field Field1, Field2; }

 

Find more information in the documentation:

  1. https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/determinations 
  2. https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_cp_index_htm/CLOUD/en-US/index.htm?file=abenbdl_general_syntax_rules.htm 

You can have a look at the implementation of the determination SetStatusToOpen in this exercise: 
https://github.com/SAP-samples/abap-platform-rap100/blob/main/exercises/ex04/README.md 

Kind regards,
Carine

entry.title: SAP B1 for HANA Email Alerts showing a common Subject
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Does anyone know what settings need to be done, to change the standard subject line which is seen on all email alerts sent from SAP B1, as below:

Subject: SAP Business One mail message, the subject is in the message body   

 
These settings changed after scheduling reports from the Analytical Portal. Before that, the email subjects were the same as the alert subject.

entry.title: Re: BAPI_OBJCL_CHANGE for MARA Characteristic value not replaced
entry.content: You did not call BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT. That was not expected. That was the reason , i asked you to share the code. Anyhow, the problem is solved, so it the objective of community.

entry.title: Updating Approved Documents not going for approval
entry.content:
We have noticed, that our PO entered via the Approval process can be updated by the originator or any other user and saved without the document going back for approval.
We have enabled the below option since we want the user to update the document if needed, but the document should be returned for approval.
If we disable the enable updating option, the user is not able to update the document at all. This is not our requirement.
In the earlier version of SAP, an updated document would be sent back for approval was working.
Could you please explain this behaviour from SAP B1 10?

entry.title: Re: Getting back to Standard Proposals with SU24 Authorisation Variants
entry.content:
Hi @l_borsboom  

Did you get any reply to this yet? I struggle with mass maintenance too.
To me it seems that a variant per role might be a nice alternative since there are customers with "poluted" roles with too many objects/values. And it's quite a nuisance to find out where which object originates from which transaction/service/wda. 
 
 
 
 
Kind regards,
 
 Wim Schmit

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA Error while passing payload using postman - p...
entry.content: You are sending an integer for the Job Count, but in your definition it is shown as string (JobCount and JobName data types seem reversed)

entry.title: Re: Setting up Payroll Processing with SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll (Point-to-point i
entry.content: Does anyone have the link to the second part? 🙂 @RubaElhafiz

entry.title: Re: Send employee from NON-SAP-Solutions to SuccessFactors EC
entry.content:
Hello,

Want to move employee data from your non-SAP system to SuccessFactors (SF) regularly? Web services can do the trick!

Two ways to go (both work):

  1. Push it: Your app actively sends updates to SF.
  2. Pull it: SF fetches data from your app on a schedule.

Here's some help getting started:

  • Pick your method: Think about your resources - pushing might require more coding on your end.
  • Data format: Use common formats like XML or JSON for easy exchange.
  • Security: Keep that employee data safe!

Talk to your tech team to choose the best method and set it up. Web services can be your bridge between your app and SF!

entry.title: Re: Deploying App using ABAP CDS Annotations
entry.content:
Hello,
please have a look at the 2nd tutorial group of this tutorial mission in the SAP Developer Center: https://developers.sap.com/mission.sap-fiori-abap-rap100.html

  • Create, Deploy and Integrate an SAP Fiori elements App into SAP Fiori Launchpad for SAP BTP, ABAP Environment [RAP100]

Kind regards,
Carine

entry.title: Re: How to Enforce 2 Factor Authentication for BTP Admin Users
entry.content: This is not possible and is a security oversight.

Hello,
My submission:

And the service documents for odata and rest protocols:

Is there a metadata document for the REST protocol? Something like automatically generated OpenAPI Specification?

entry.title: SAP IDES SPS Upgrade Questions Using Maintenance Planner and SUM
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are trying to upgrade SPS on our IDES server.

So, I want to download a specific SPS using Maintenance Planner (MP).

For example, you are currently using SAP_BASIS 750 SP 009 and your target is SAP_BASIS 750 SP 26.

However, in MP, it seems that you can select the EHP version and download only the SP that matches it.

Can you tell me how to select a specific SP for a component using MP?

Or is it not possible using the above method?

 

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Google Play Store - Publish Rejected
entry.content:
Any Update on this. We need this ASAP! . thank you!.

@eshrinivasan 
@anne-petteroe 
@beapasch 
@AprilYu 
@sureshmusham 
@BorisDafov 
@VinayKumawat 
@EsmeeX 
@ajmaradiaga 
@Margit_Wagner

entry.title: Re: How to Enforce 2 Factor Authentication for BTP Admin Users
entry.content: This is not possible and is a security oversight. BTP recommends using SSO for all users via your own Custom Identity Provider . We do this. We enforce MFA. BTP also recommends having a global account fallback in case SSO configuration changes / is broken on the Default Identity Provider. You can not enforce MFA there, as per: https://github.com/SAP-docs/btp-cloud-platform/blob/main/docs/50-administration-and-ops/default-identity-provider-d6a8db7.md Obviously this means you're always going to have a backdoor with just username and password. I suppose there are complex workarounds like configuring IAS/IPS to also provision the BTP global account with users from the DIP, but if your SSO is broken and you can't get on there - this won't work.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hi David,

My name is Nishith, a recent college graduate embarking on a career as an SAP Consultant. I have completed certificates in Discover SAP Business Technology Platform, Developing with SAP Integration Suite, and Financial Accounting Overview in SAP S/4HANA. I am passionate about learning and fully committed to mastering SAP. Excited to connect and grow within this community!

Thank You!

entry.title: Need Blob to text conversion in Data Sphere
entry.content:
Hi folks,

I have table in S/4 hana STXl to store the long text for all other tables which i am using it in Data sphere to get text but i am failing to convert the clustd value  TO_CHAR(TO_NCLOB(TO_BINARY('FF06020102028000343130330000000063010000121F9D0232663E060606461E20C1C0CA80058430F8307832F831B832AC85A85C05166601538C1CEB2082FBA0', 'HEX'))) text but it was giving an error for conversion.

 

 

Could anyone please help me here to convert this in data sphere or any suggestion would be helpful.

entry.title: Re: How to do a select before selection screen dsiplayed?
entry.content: It doesn't actually clear last_storndate. The INITIALIZATION select max zstorndate and puts it into last_storndate. Then it initializes SELECT-OPTIONS so_storn with it. Yes, you should always fill SELECT-OPTIONS like that.

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA Error while passing payload using postman - p...
entry.content: yes i have corrected that mistake still getting same issue

entry.title: Re: Automatic creation of JT file in ECTR
entry.content:
JT creation is already enabled in the default DTypes delivered by NX integration.

Check for 

<checkin_rules>

...

<scripts>
<script name="@PLM_BINDIR_UGS@\NX_Create3DViewables.exe">
<params>
<param name="-d" value="$(add_dir)"/>
<param name="-t" value="jt,jtm,stp"/>
</params>
</script>
</scripts>
</checkin_rules>

in the DType template NXMDL.

entry.title: Se16n view change
entry.content: I know there is a way to change the view of tables in tranzaction Se16n /se16 from the first picture to the second one but I can not find

entry.title: Hello SAP World
entry.content:
Hey Guys,

this is my first blog post. I look forward to good discussions and a good exchange of information with you.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Fiori deployment on ABAP server.
entry.content:
Hello Noel! 

I have solved 1st and 2nd issue with changing the UI5 version in fiori tools for version what I have on the server and changing script in index.html from

 

 

<script
      id="sap-ui-bootstrap"
      src="resources/sap-ui-core.js"
></script>

 

 

to

 

 

<script
      id="sap-ui-bootstrap"
      type="text/javascript"
      src="https://ui5.sap.com/resources/sap-ui-core.js">
</script>

 

 

 with that change all resources are loading perfectly fine!

The third issue is still unresolved 

the $metadata?sap-client=001&sap-language=PL is loagind fine with url: http://192.168.1.124:50000/sap/opu/odata/SAP/SERVICE_SRV/$metadata?sap-client=001&sap-language=PL

but the $metadata is not loading because it have wrong request url http://192.168.1.124:50000/SERVICE_SRV/$metadata and I'm getting 404 Not found error.
The correct url is http://192.168.1.124:50000/sap/opu/odata/SAP/SERVICE_SRV/$metadata. Don't know why is requesting http://192.168.1.124:50000/SERVICE_SRV/$metadata  :(. 

 

Everything is working perfectly fine when I run app locally. 

manifest.json:

 

 

    "dataSources": {
      "ticketService": {
        "uri": "/sap/opu/odata/SAP/SERVICE_SRV/",
        "type": "OData",
        "settings": {
          "annotations": [],
          "localUri": "localService/SERVICE_SRV/metadata.xml",
          "odataVersion": "2.0"
        }
      }
    }

 

 

ui5.yaml:

 

 

specVersion: '3.1'
metadata:
  name: com.service
type: application
server:
  customMiddleware:
    - name: fiori-tools-proxy
      afterMiddleware: compression
      configuration:
        ignoreCertError: false # If set to true, certificate errors will be ignored. E.g. self-signed certificates will be accepted
        ui5:
          path:
            - /resources
            - /test-resources
          url: https://ui5.sap.com
        backend:
          - path: /SERVICE_SRV/
            url: http://192.168.1.124:50000/sap/opu/odata/SAP
            client: '001'
          - path: /sap/opu/odata/SAP/SERVICE_SRV/
            url: http://192.168.1.124:50000
            client: '001'

 

 


Thanks for all help!

entry.title: Re: payment difference posted to an expense account as re...
entry.content:
Hi,

You may check in tx. FS03, if G/L 71000010 has a 6% Tax category defined in field SKB1-MWSKZ.

You may remove all together, if not required.

Best,

Georgios

entry.title: Re: Tracking of material consumption in Quality Testing through QM Order
entry.content: Please don't post to Questions about SAP Websites (issue with community Website, etc.) if it's a question about SAP software. Instead, ask in Technology Q&A: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/qa-p/technology-questions. Hopefully someone will fix it for you. What is currently shown: SAP Community > Questions about SAP Websites > Tracking of material consumption in Quality Testin...

entry.title: Re: Se16n view change
entry.content: Please don't post to Questions about SAP Websites (issue with community Website, etc.) if it's a question about SAP software. Instead, ask in Technology Q&A: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/qa-p/technology-questions. Hopefully someone will fix it for you. What is currently shown: SAP Community > Questions about SAP Websites > Se16n view change

entry.title: See how SAP Enterprise Support helps customers use SAP Build to empower their digital transformation
entry.content:
SAP Build is a comprehensive suite of low-code and pro-code tools designed to accelerate application development and automation with the power of generative AI. It is built on SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) from SAP that helps accelerate development and automation. SAP Build is an enabler for everyone no matter the skill level to create and enhance enterprise applications, process automations, and business sites, all with drag-and-drop simplicity. 

Consisting of three components SAP Build Apps, SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Work Zone, it empowers more users to develop irrespective of their skill level thereby lessening the burden on professional developers.

SAP Build Code is a comprehensive application development environment tailored for developers working with Java and JavaScript. The turnkey solution combines runtime and design time capabilities with built-in enterprise solution integrations, DevOps, and Application Lifecycle Management. Joule, the AI copilot that understands your business, is available to assist with code generation.

In this blog, we are elaborating the assets which are available to provide foundational Support to customers as part of their SAP Enterprise Support cloud edition subscription to use the SAP Build portfolio to empower their digital transformation. 

With SAP Enterprise Support, customers can:

  • Receive guidance and realize value through AI-powered services, best practice content, remote quality checks, and assessment services. 
  • Empower your team to gain knowledge and skills and collaborate with experts for answers to support-related questions.
  • Transform your end-to-end landscape with application lifecycle management solutions to deploy, operate, and optimize cloud and hybrid business solutions.

If you want to just gain an overview of the SAP Build portfolio we have provided this SAP Build Big Picture session. In this e-learning, you will gain an overview of the SAP Build portfolio including SAP Build Code. It discusses the importance of the Clean Core concept and explore the low code/no code tools available for building new applications. Additionally, a high-level overview of SAP Build Code application development, assisted by Joule, is provided. For more detail, we have provided all the overview sessions for the SAP Build portfolio in the learning program Learn to develop using low-code through SAP Build provided through the SAP Enterprise Support Value Map program.

Below we have listed the SAP Build components and the corresponding support provided to customers to get started:

SAP Build Process Automation

SAP Build Process Automation powers the automation of workflows and tasks with comprehensive workflow management, robotic process automation, and AI capabilities.  

To gain an overview to SAP Build Process Automation we have created a Discovery Center mission on Foundational support to start with SAP Build Process Automation. This includes an introductory session which has a demo the tool in action. Also it includes a multi-day Expert Guided Implementation service on SAP Build Process Automation. The purpose of this EGI service is to ramp-up customers to understand and adopt SAP Build Process Automation. In the first step, we give an overview of process automation in the context of SAP Build. Afterwards we show case the capabilities of SAP Build Process Automation and customers learn how to create workflows, decision management, and task automation with powerful yet intuitive no-code capabilities through the configuration of a specific business process to approve Sales Orders automatically. Further information including how to register for the service is provided here.

SAP Build Apps

SAP Build Apps is an evolution of SAP AppGyver and it enables users to build web and mobile enterprise applications.  With hundreds of templates and pre-built business logic components, you can jumpstart your application projects and reduce development time. 

To gain an overview to SAP Build Process Automation we have created a Discovery Center mission on Foundational support to start with SAP Build Apps. This includes an introductory session. Also it includes a multi-day Expert Guided Implementation service on SAP Build Apps. The purpose of this EGI service is to ramp-up customers to understand and adopt SAP Build Apps. In the first step, we give an overview of application development in the context of SAP Build. Afterwards we show case the capabilities of SAP Build Apps and customers learn how to create mobile and web applications, connect to SAP systems, and deploy and run on SAP Business Technology Platform.​ Further information including how to register for the service is provided here.

SAP Build Work Zone

SAP Build Work Zone, brings the capabilities of SAP Launchpad and SAP Work Zone into one solution, facilitating the rapid creation of engaging and personalized business sites. It provides centralized access to business application information on any device.

To give an overview on SAP Build Work Zone, we have created the e-learning Explore the power of SAP Build Work Zone - SAP BTP Adoption Tutorial which provides a comprehensive Central Entry Point Digital experience. It encompasses an introduction to essential tools such as SAP Build Work Zone, SAP Task Center, and SAP Mobile Start. Key topics are discussed including the capabilities of SAP Build Work Zone, both standard and advanced editions and Identity and Access management through the SAP Cloud Identity Service. Also, we take a deep dive into the One Inbox suite quality of the SAP Task Center. and SAP Mobile Start as your native mobile entry point.

To provide further information for SAP Build Work Zone, we have created additional e-learnings. Firstly, we give an overview to integrate SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition and SAP Mobile Start. We walk you through the configuration process for the SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition ensuring you gain a comprehensive understanding of its setup and functionalities. Also, you will gain proficiency in integrating SAP Mobile Start with SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition.

Also, we have provided an e-learning for SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition Deep Dive to effectively configure, deploy, and manage SAP Build Work Zone environments, leveraging its capabilities to enhance collaboration and productivity within your organization. The content shows how to set up SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition with integration of IAS (Identity Authentication Service) and IPS (Identity Provisioning Service) for user access, the process of creating a workspace and adding content such as How-to documents and technical support access, developing a UI Card in SAP Business Application Studio and deploying it to the workspace and integrating the Launchpad service and adding exposed content from an SAP S/4HANA system.

SAP Build Code

Apart from the SAP Build Big Picture session which provides an overview to SAP Build Code, we are piloting a new Expert Guided Implementation service on Cloud Application Programming Development using SAP Build Code. The purpose of this service is to empower customers with the knowledge of CAP development in SAP HANA Cloud and provide customers with the knowledge to develop and design in SAP HANA Cloud utilizing the SAP Business Application studio using SAP Build Code and the SAP AI co-pilot Joule. To find out more about this pilot through SAP Enterprise Support Advisory Council, please reach out directly.

The e-learning Clean Core with SAP Business Technology Platform offers valuable insights to understand how SAP Business Technology Platform can help cultivate a cleaner and more sustainable core for SAP systems. It offers insights into how SAP BTP can support the fundamental pillars of data, integration, and extensibility. It explores the topic of extensibility in-depth and how the various components of SAP Business Technology Platform support the building of extensions in line with clean core principles.

For customers, if you have issues accessing the above links, there may be an authorizations issue. Please note a one-time registration in SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support, is required for most of the above assets. A detailed step-by step guide to registration can be found here.

For internal colleagues, if you cannot access the above links, please use the following link, click on “Access” and use the above direct link once access has been granted.

We hope that this range of content and assets will support you in your digital transformation. For any queries in relation to any of the above assets, please reach out to us directly.

Thanks and Regards,

Robert Kelly

SAP BTP Lead Architect – SAP Enterprise Support

entry.title: Re: Task 5 - A "REST" service document (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&quot
entry.content:
Another great question (that I hoped someone would ask)! 

There isn't a metadata document for "REST" protocol served services, but yes, we can generate an OpenAPI definition for it, out of band.

`cds compile --to openapi ...`

Note that there are also OpenAPI specific options here: `--openapi:url` and `--openapi:servers`.

entry.title: Re: SF LMS and VLS MS Teams Integration - Error: Instruct...
entry.content: Hi Moulika, in this case I would check the permission with your Microsoft Team, if everything is set up correctly and also the documentation from SAP. If this persists, I would create a support case with SAP to check the settings and also the Class details. We have done Test with a lot of different Tool, which makes it easiser to find whats missing.

entry.title: Re: Task 5 - A "REST" service document (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&quot
entry.content:
Another great point / observation. On "it seems that the REST service is not showing whether it is a bound or unbound service" I would say that the concept of bound / unbound is more of an OData specific term; I would also argue that a URL path like this:

/path/to/thing/42/somefunction

is, outside of the context of OData, naturally seen as, or is expected to operate, in what we call here a "bound" fashion anyway.

entry.title: Re: Task 5 - A "REST" service document (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&quot
entry.content:
Hello @qmacro ,

My submission for task 5:

I read all the valuable comments below from various participants and from @qmacro , which really helped me understand the concepts of these service and metadata document much better. Thanks a lot for that!

entry.title: Re: Hi, I am unable to capture combo box and drop down using SAP BPA desktop studio for SAP fiori AP
entry.content: Just to add - please use instead the Recorder functionality in the cloud studio (i.e. browser based automation lobby), as shown in this video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UwezNitDHvU and described in this help guide https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/use-recorder-to-enhance-application-capture-and-automation-design

entry.title: Table maintenance generator in SAP ABAP - only allow new entries and delete entries
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have created a table maintenance generator for a custom table in SAP and a tcode for the table maintenance generator. When we click on the maintain on the SM30 screen or thru the custom tcode, the entries are in change mode initially, the requirement is that we keep the entries only in display mode. In case the user needs to make any changes, either a new entry must be created or the existing entry must be deleted. I have excluded the ANZG function for Change. However I am unsure how to give the users only display access but then create new entries should be allowed. After saving an entry in the table no changes should be allowed i.e. the fields should be in display mode. if the user makes a mistake they will delete the entry and make a new entry again. Please help me understand how to achieve the requirement using table maintenance events.

entry.title: How to hidden parameter element with ABAP public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I want to hide parameters with conditions.

 

You can see the attachment image below :Parameter Data Defination

Behavior Defination

Example: hide parameter element Company (P_Company) when ReportID equals 'API1' or 'TB'.

Web appPlease help me. Thanks and best Regards

Daroi

entry.title: Re: openSAP has moved: Find over 100 former openSAP courses on the SAP Learning site
entry.content:
@rajashekar_chandrashekar Thanks for your questions. All migrated openSAP courses are offered unchanged and in self-paced mode on the SAP Learning site. You can start learning immediately. No notifications are required and there is no change regarding the system access.

New courses will be announced soon, so stay tuned. The first new course will be announced via the SAP Learning Hub newsletter. You can subscribe for the newsletter for free to not miss the course announcement. You can also join the SAP Learning group here in the SAP Community to stay up-to-date with the latest learning opportunities.

entry.title: Pricing Procedure automation (Raw Material sales)
entry.content:
My client is selling raw materials from one plant to another.They want the purchased value of the raw materials to automatically be set as the base price during the sale (automation is mandatory). We are working with S/4HANA Public Cloud. Can anyone suggest a solution for this requirement? 

Note: (No STO Process following here sales should be normal by creating that plant as customer) 

Thank you,

entry.title: Re: Execute custom logic at permission import
entry.content:
Hi @hackbu ,

This is an unexpected system behavior, please submit a ticket under the CEC-MKT-DM-CON component.

Follow KBA 2931353 - How to create a perfect case for SAP Marketing Cloud

I hope this answers your query to close the thread.

Thanks and Regards,
Kunal Bansal
SAP CX Solution Architect

entry.title: Re: eInvoice Email-Process - Process Status is stuck on "...
entry.content:
Dear Lukas,

the documentation that you are referring to requires some rework, especially "You've uploaded a certificate to authenticate the cloud edition of SAP Document and Reporting Compliance. See Uploading a Client Certificate for the Cloud Edition."

Instead, please follow the instructions provided above that will generate you a new BTP Destination Certificate, that you can then trust in S/4 HANA Cloud.
You cannot use the S/4 HANA Cloud Client certificate here, as this is the certificate that is used for 1.) of the communication directions outlined, and not 2.), which is in scope of your question.
1. S/4 HANA Cloud (Private certificate of S/4 HANA) -> SAP DRC (via Service Binding and Public Certificate of S/4 HANA) > This direction is used for sending Invoices or Credit Notes
2. SAP DRC (private Certificate of the BTP Destination) -> S/4 HANA Cloud (allows authentication via Public Certificate of BTP Destination) > This direction is used to receive Message Level Responses, Business Level Responses, Incoming Invoices, Incoming Credit Notes and Schematron validation results

 

Regards, Uwe

entry.title: S4HC- Create the billing document for down payment
entry.content:
I would like to know if i can create the invoice for the down payment amount immediately upon receiving the money.

I want to create two invoices instead of issuing one invoice for the total amount at the end.

thanks~

entry.title: Re: SAC Excel MEMERPROPERTY not returning Description
entry.content:
Hello,

The behavior change you have observed is due to a change Excal add-in team has performed in order to align the property display in the table (when you choose to display a property in the table) with what was displayed in the “properties” dialog because, until this change, both of them were not aligned.

To solve your current issue with SAP.MEMBERPROPERTY, you have to update your SAP.MEMBERPROPERTY formulas by putting the property id (available in the “properties” dialog) instead of the property description.

Best regards,

Florent Migeon, product owner for SAC Excel add-in

entry.title: Re: Enabling SAP Build Process Automation's My Inbox App in SAP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition
entry.content:
Hi Joni,
Despite following all the steps mentioned and performing the content refresh, I am unable to see the My Inbox Option in the Content Explorer to add.
Are there any other options/ configurations to perform for it to work please?

entry.title: Re: Hello SAP World
entry.content:
Hello @Sebastian_hok welcome to SAP Community and great you are starting your first discussion - a blog post is rather a structured article from your point of view. Read here more about our blogs in SAP Community. 😉

Do you want to share a bit more about you? What is your expertise and how long do you work already in the SAP area?

entry.title: Re: How to setup and configure SAP Build Process Automation

I have created new business process in that, but after creation of new business process, when I click to check further then it seems the SAP BPA UI is broken. It is not populating the all labels properly in UI layer. Can you please help here or help me out to correct this? Please let me know, if I missed anything for configuration part of service anywhere. Sharing the error screenshot for the reference. 

 

@Dan_Wroblewski Please help, if possible.

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM - Possible to recover deleted documents?
entry.content:
If you delete a document in Cloud ALM, is there a "recycle bin" or some other options to recover it? 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: I want to understand how the Batch Job change logs can be pulled from SAP .
entry.content:
Hi,

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/change-log-for-a-bcg-job/td-p/8525823 

 

background job is not an object, so it does not have change history.

During execution of job with defined period new task is scheduled.

So what You can do is check previous executions and compare parameters

- look at TBTCO (and maybe others TBTC*) tables.

  • Or

It is not possible to see the changes, if the good house keeping job deleted the job logs. The only way to find out the issue, may be investigating change documents (CDHDR and CDPOS tables), if they are keeping changes on it. One another way is checking table change logs, if the table logging is activated.

 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/need-to-find-change-log-of-a-sap-background-job-and-creation-date/qaq-p/8843193

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Credit Management Technical Jobs
entry.content:
Technical jobs in scope for the cloud can be seen in table STJR_JOBD_SCOPE

Following is the list of technical jobs for credit management in S/4HANA Cloud.

SAP_FIN_FSCM_CR_MD_SIT_DELETE

SAP_FIN_FSCM_CR_PAYM_UPDATE

SAP_FIN_FSCM_CR_UPD_PAYM_BEH_KPI

SAP_FIN_UKM_CALCULATE_PREDICTION

SAP_FIN_UKM_DEL_FS_RATIOS_IMPORT

SAP_FIN_UKM_TMP_HIERARCHY_DELETE

Refer to the information below on technical jobs and the corresponding application jobs in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

1.) Package – UKM_BP_DP

Job name : SAP_FIN_FSCM_CR_MD_SIT_DELETE

Parameters:

Delete Financial Statement KPIs help portal documentation. 

 

2.) Package – UKM_GENERAL

Job: SAP_FIN_FSCM_CR_PAYM_UPDATE

Parameters:

 

Recreate Payment Behavior Summary  help portal documentation.

Send Delta of Payment Behaviour Summary help portal documentation.

Rebuild Credit Exposure help portal documentation.

Reorganize Credit Segment Assignment in Journal Entries help portal documentation.

 

3.) Package – UKM_GENERAL_KEYFIG

Job : SAP_FIN_FSCM_CR_UPD_PAYM_BEH_KPI

Parameters:

Update Payment Behavior Key Figures help portal documentation. 

 

4.) Package – UKM_EXPOSURE_PREDICTION

Job name : SAP_FIN_UKM_CALCULATE_PREDICTION

Only technical job definition exists. The application job catalog is not present.

 

5.) Package : ODATA_CREDIT_MGMT_KPI

Job name : SAP_FIN_UKM_DEL_FS_RATIOS_IMPORT

Only technical job definition exists. The application job catalog is not present.

 

6.) Package : ODATA_CREDIT_IMPORT_HIERARCHY

Job name SAP_FIN_UKM_TMP_HIERARCHY_DELETE

Only technical job definition exists. The application job catalog is not present.

 

Reference resources:- 

Application Jobs - ABAP Server Experience Team Wiki - Wiki@SAP (int.sap)

Technical Job Repository Design Time Guide - ABAP Server Experience Team Wiki - Wiki@SAP (int.sap)

entry.title: Re: Signavio Process Manager: RACI Matrix, Role Management and pointers about "A", "C
entry.content: Another great way to visualize the (R)ACI is through the Attribute Visualization (Setup > Define notation/attributes). You can then toggle the ACI in the Collaboration Hub.

entry.title: Re: BADI to determine Sales Order header data using sales order item in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Aman,
Which standard fields do you want to change? In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud it is not allowed to change all standard fields in one place as that could lead to inconsistencies and it needs to be ensured, that dependent follow up processes are triggered for field changes.

Therefore it is currently only possible to change custom fields in SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM and SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD. For some standard fields there are specific Cloud BAdIs or Configuration UIs to set values for them.

For example the BAdI SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD_TAX, which was mentioned by you. In that BAdI it is allowed to change standard fields related to taxes.

If there is no BAdI or configuration UI available for the fields you want to change, you need to request that specific feature via influence portal:

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/1170

You can learn more about feature requests in this note.

best regards,
Christian

entry.title: Re: Auto packaging in outbound delivery through abap code
entry.content: Would you know which parameters of WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE must be filled to acomplish this objective?

entry.title: Re: Auto packaging in outbound delivery through abap code
entry.content: Would you know which parameters of WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE must be filled to acomplish this objective? Thanks in advance

entry.title: Facing error while building and watching CAP project.
entry.content:
I am getting the following error while executing an mta.yaml build or while executing "cds watch" command.

I am not entirely sure what is to be done for this.

user: xsuaa-user-test $ cds watch --profile hybrid
node:events:496
      throw er; // Unhandled 'error' event
      ^

Error: ENOENT: no such file or directory, stat '/home/user/projects/xsuaa-user-test/gen/srv/node_modules/@types/sap__cds'
    at statSync (node:fs:1659:25)
    at #watchFile (node:internal/fs/recursive_watch:152:28)
    at #watchFolder (node:internal/fs/recursive_watch:129:26)
    at #watchFolder (node:internal/fs/recursive_watch:131:30)
    at #watchFolder (node:internal/fs/recursive_watch:131:30)
    at #watchFolder (node:internal/fs/recursive_watch:131:30)
    at #watchFolder (node:internal/fs/recursive_watch:131:30)
    at [kFSWatchStart] (node:internal/fs/recursive_watch:200:26)
    at Object.watch (node:fs:2461:36)
    at tryWatch (/managed-content/globals/pnpm/5/.pnpm/node-watch@0.7.4/node_modules/node-watch/lib/watch.js:131:15)
Emitted 'error' event on Watcher instance at:
    at /managed-content/globals/pnpm/5/.pnpm/node-watch@0.7.4/node_modules/node-watch/lib/watch.js:134:15
    at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:77:11) {
  errno: -2,
  code: 'ENOENT',
  syscall: 'stat',
  path: '/home/user/projects/xsuaa-user-test/gen/srv/node_modules/@types/sap__cds',
  filename: '/home/user/projects/xsuaa-user-test'
}

Node.js v20.12.0

entry.title: Deletion of one employee number
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I accidently created one employee number. Now the number is active in SAP from 01-July-2024. Is it possible to delete or else to change the starting date of the employee? I am not authorized to use the code PU00. So is there any way to change the starting date. Please view the attached file.

entry.title: Audit of changes Previous Employers (Work Experience)
entry.content:
Hi,

is it possible to check who and when added/removed data from People Profile for the specific user -> Career -> Work Experience -> block "Previous Employers" created as Live Profile MDF Information?

I've run some Audit Reports but I don't see there data from this block. 

Thank you and regards,

Aneta Krysiak

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: Re: Auto packaging in outbound delivery through abap code
entry.content:
Hello @Daderiga 

No, I don't know that of the top of my head. However you can easily figure it out by yourself. Use WE19 to build WHSCON IDoc as described on the SAP Help page that I have provided previously. Once you are satisfied with how the IDoc packs the delivery, put a break point in WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE and WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE_2 - WHSCON IDocs are processed by one of those functions, I don't remember by which one exactly. This way you can get the right parameters to call the function. 

However, I'd suggest to use WHSCON IDocs, instead of calling WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE directly. It's much better - standard solution supported by SAP, robust error processing.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation : coming soon on MacOS !
entry.content:
@sherry_qiao From SAP support, just now: "We are still validating the MacOS support internally and for now it's not supported.". 🤔

This is not 'soon' @cpuget - do you have any further details?

entry.title: How to add cost shipment booking (VI01) in existing configuration
entry.content: I'm unable to add the new plant details in existing shipment cost booking configuration to book transportation charges through VI01 transaction

entry.title: Re: BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST Error G/L account is not defin...
entry.content:
Hello @Abapper0114 

An account has to be created before you can post to it. 

Probably you need to add leading zeros to the account number before passing it to the BAPI.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP Datasphere with SAP Integrated Business Planning, using SAP CI - Part 1
entry.content:
Hi @Domnic, 

thanks for this blog. 

Will there be a live connection between Datasphere and IBP without the middleware in the near future? Like in SAC.

Greetings

Patrick

entry.title: Issue with Storing Action/Parameter Data in Draft Table on Non-Editable Object Page
entry.content:
Hey Experts,

I have a situation where I have one action button with a parameter. Currently, this parameter or action occurs before the edit action. The issue I'm facing is that since my object page is non-editable, the data from that pop-up is not getting stored in the draft table. I have already implemented draft logic, but it isn't functioning as expected. Does anyone have any ideas on how I can store the data in the draft table even though my object page is not editable?

Your expertise and advice would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: Re: BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST Error G/L account is not defin...
entry.content:
Hi 

Take help from functional and get the config done.

1st. you need to create the account at COA Level in T.Code FSP1 or FSP0 .

2nd. you need to create the account at company code level using T.Code FSS0

You can also do both steps in one at T.Code FS00

entry.title: Re: BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST Error G/L account is not defin...
entry.content: But when I debug the program, there was already leading zeroes in GL_ACCOUNT like '0006000170'. This also is not hardcoded, I just modified for easy reading.

entry.title: Re: BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST Error G/L account is not defin...
entry.content:
You are using the GL account without leading zeroes. Use the below code

CALL FUNCTION ‘CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT’
EXPORTING
input = gl_account
IMPORTING
output = gl_account.

Congrats to all the organization team!

entry.title: SD Pricelist (TA: V_NLN) - Layout
entry.content:
Hello,

in the SD pricelist report (TA: V_NLN) there are two badis which are called:

- BADI_PIQ_SDPRICELIST

- BADI_PIQ_SDPRICELIST_OUTPUT

with a couple of methods to change the processing/result of the report.

1.) Is there a way to adjust the ALV layout, e.g. have the option for 'Optimized Width' or 'Zebra' pattern active (w/o modification)?

2.) Is there a way to tell the system to download an excel file with extension of .xlsx instead of the old extension .xls

Thanks for you answers and ideas,

bapimueller/Thomas

entry.title: Re: Enabling SAP Build Process Automation's My Inbox App in SAP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition
entry.content: @sapbtpuser perhaps re-check again the destination configuration, just to make sure the `sap_process_automation_service` destination fields & values configuration matched from the service key that you have generated SAP Build Process Automation service instance.

entry.title: Re: Qual formato devemos seguir para o próximo encontro SAP Meet up? Compartilhe suas Preferências
entry.content:
@Marssel700 , primeiro...parabens pela ideia de ouvir a comunidade sobre este tema!

Eu gosto e acho util os Workshops, Webinares e Eventos de networking. Acho interessante o format dos SIT pois me parece que conseguem oferecer um pouco de todos estes aspectos, dependendo do formato de organização!

entry.title: Call for speakers - SAP Stammtisch Plus Hyderabad :- 3rd Aug 2024
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community!

We are gearing up to host an in-person SAP Stammtisch Plus event 

Date, Time & Location

3rd Aug 2024 (SATURDAY)
From 9:00 AM  onwards
SAP Callidus Cloud, 6th floor, Building No. 12-B, Raheja Mindspace IT Park (Google Maps)

 With the success of last SIT Hyderabad events and the excitement of community folks, 

If you are interested to be part of this Event as Speaker register Call for Speakers Stammtisch + 

Note: This is an In-person Event only

If you have any questions, please get in touch with us at sapcommunityhyderabad@gmail.com. We look forward to reviewing your session submission and featuring your expertise at the event.

Please help spread the word about speaker registration by sharing this post with your network.

 

Thanks & Regards
Ruthvik Chowdary

entry.title: Re: eInvoice Email-Process - Process Status is stuck on "...

Dear @Uwe_K,
i have changed the settings but if i check the connection of the destination (with the certificate i created with your guide) i get the following message: "Connection to "0M5PLFE" established. Response returned: "401: Unauthorized",  thats why i tried to use the other certificate. I have also tried to reprocess the documents in the peppol exchange app but the "reprocess button" is grayed out and i cant click it. Does this mean i have to delete and recreate the participant ?

entry.content:
Thanks for those great addons!

For any reason when opening the search tool, I see an error an the bottom of window in tab Abap Code Search (DevEpos) and a similar one in tab Abap Object Search (DevEpos) and within Tags, too:

I'm running Eclipse 2024-06 and those plugin versions

S/4 Hana on-premise is version SAP-Basis 7.57 SP2.

Do I miss the obvious? Anything I've got to upgrade or any switches I've to enable?

entry.title: Re: Converting ICON value to Image in CDS View
entry.content: The annotation proposed for the metadata extension has no effect on the Fiori Elements application. The text is still displayed in the field.

entry.title: Re: Travel expenses payment in foreign currency - PR05
entry.content:
The problem is solved. 
Although the refund amount is displayed in GBP, the billing is done in the original currency of the receipt.
You need to display additional columns (Amount in doc.curr. and Document Currency) in transaction FBL1N to see this.

entry.title: Insufficient permissions to access the requested data
entry.content:
While hitting "profile/identity/v4.1/Users/.search" API in Postman getting below error:

{
    "status": 401,
    "schemas": [
        "urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:2.0:Error",
        "urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:concur:2.0:Error"
    ],
    "urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:concur:2.0:Error": {
        "messages": [
            {
                "code": "UNAUTHORIZED"
            }
        ]
    },
    "detail": "Insufficient permissions to access the requested data"
}
Need help to resolve this issue, thanks

Here you will get an update after CE2408 how to build a Cash Sales solution in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Regards,

Doreen

entry.title: Re: Questions regarding the distinctions between SAP HCM on-premise and H4S4:

entry.title: Future Hire /Current hire notification to manager
entry.content:
Team, 

Requirement is to trigger a custom notification on hire date of employee.

In EC if you add employee it is working fine,however when candidate is pushed from Manage pending hire to EC and submitted, no notification trigger

Business rule Screenshot is attached.- Rule is placed on Save alert under job info. base object Job information
Workflow screenshot is attached

Note form EC side working fine, From Manage pending hire if candidate comes it is not triggering email notification

Kindly help

entry.title: Re: Modeling a basic Hierarchy with Directory in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
@RossR in my blog I am not assigning labels within the HwD view itself. In fact, I'm not assigning any texts in my basic example. In the advanced (next) blog on modeling, I associate separate dimensions that again associate a text view. 

I've reproduced your setup and my conclusions:

  • In your screenshots, it seems that you are not using your Node Type Values in the right way. You have selected column NODETYPE as containing the types, but these types you are not using in the "Node Type Value" definition. E.g., for CHILDID "00000001" your NODETYPE='0HIER...', but you are not using that node type in your HwD definition. There you use 'Text Node' as the node type value, but I do not see that value in your NODETYPE column. If you fix this, you might actually see at least the selected columns (e.g. what you have selected under "Column 1") as your description.
  • I would argue that your method of assigning labels within the HwD view, is not supported. Instead, work according to the setup in my blog. That means:
    • From the dimension to which you associate the HwD view (Product in my examples), associate the text view for the leaf nodes 
    • From the HwD view, associate a dimension with itself an associated text view to the intermediary nodes. You might not need the dimension and directly associate a text view to the HwD view.

entry.title: Re: CDS view to find the Classification characteristic de...
entry.content:
Hi Gahan ,

 

Please use the CDS view ClfnCharcDescForKeyDate to retrieve the description of the characteristic shown

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: sap.fe.macros.Field - How do i get the base control (...
entry.content: @nicolas_lunet I see you're doing it for a dropdown. But what if it's for a field with a value help (not dropdown via annotations) and you want to clear the field to clear (blank) and not set to any value from the value help? That's the use case I'm after

entry.title: Re: No check on foreign key in ADT-defined database table
entry.content:
Value Helps in RAP are defined with Consumption.ValueHelpDefinition annotations as described here: Providing Value Help for the Selection Fields | SAP Help Portal

Foreign key relationships are evaluated by the RAP framework, for example, during a read-by-association operations and in the ON condition of associations.

entry.title: Re: payment difference posted to an expense account as re...
entry.content: @sofianos_g，Yes, removing values of tax category in the account - 71000010 Indeed solved my issue! The previous value was set as “- input tax allowed”, so it derived the tax code from opened invoice

entry.title: Active Directory and SAP S/4 integration via BTP
entry.content:
Dear all
one of my customer is requesting me the possibility to interface is Active Directory with his SAP S/4. And he wants to create SAP users in a specific group in AC to be created in SAP S/4.
and even deleted or set to end of validity once the user went out of this AD group
there's a BTP service that allows this kind of scenario?
